text: In this space of glass walls and colorful, immersive displays, I sense the collective striving of intellects gathered to ponder the mysteries of technology and knowledge. The distortion of physical angles makes me question the solidity of my perspective, as if the very room is nudging me to consider new angles in both thought and being. Here, surrounded by the language of research and development, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and reverence—a sense that I am on the threshold of discovery, part participant, part observer in the unfolding drama of human understanding. There is a subtle excitement in the air, underwritten by the quiet hum of potential.
